data.title: BitGo: Core Institutional Crypto Infrastructure Benefiting From Regulated DeFi and Tokenized Assets Growth
data.description:
BitGo Holdings, Inc. Class A (BTGO) has received a new Buy rating, initiated by Citi analyst, Peter Christiansen.

President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Peter Christiansen has given his Buy rating due to a combination of factors tied to BitGo’s strategic positioning in institutional crypto infrastructure. He views the company as a core hub for on-chain finance, evolving from a pure custody provider into a broader workflow and infrastructure platform that can capture a larger share of client spending as digital assets mature.

Christiansen also argues that BitGo is well placed to benefit from the growth of regulated DeFi and tokenized real‑world assets, supported by its security-focused, multi‑signature custody and strong compliance framework. Despite trimming near‑term revenue and EBITDA estimates to reflect recent crypto volatility, he believes the company’s projected high-teens margins and roughly 30% medium‑term revenue growth justify the $18 target price and Buy/High Risk rating.

Christiansen covers the Technology sector, focusing on stocks such as Strategy, Bullish, and Pagaya Technologies Ltd. According to TipRanks, Christiansen has an average return of -0.2% and a 49.53% success rate on recommended stocks.

data.title: Buy Rating on Perspective Therapeutics (CATX) Driven by Differentiated Radiopharmaceutical Platform and Undervalued Long-Term Upside
data.description:

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Rajan Sharma has given his Buy rating due to a combination of factors that, in his view, create an attractive risk‑reward profile for Perspective Therapeutics (CATX). He highlights the company’s differentiated radiopharmaceutical platform, which targets significant unmet medical needs and positions CATX to participate in a growing niche within oncology treatment.

Sharma also points to a solid clinical and regulatory roadmap, with upcoming milestones that could serve as catalysts for the share price, alongside a balance sheet he views as sufficient to fund key development steps. In addition, he sees the current valuation as not fully reflecting CATX’s long‑term revenue and margin potential, supporting his view that the stock offers meaningful upside from current levels.
